usage: report_analysis_coverage [-help] [<pin_port_list>] [-check_type <check_type_list>] [-exclude_untested <reason_list>] [-include_dyn_checks] [-include_parallel_check_arcs] [-include_when_cond] [-max_paths <integer>] [-nworst <integer>] [-retime {aocv ssta path_slew_propagation aocv_path_slew_propagation}] [-sort {pin refpin checktype slack reason}] [-tcl_list] [-unsorted] [-verbose <check_status_list>] [-view <view_name>] [> <filename[.gz]>] [>> <filename[.gz]>]

options.name: <pin_port_list>
options.description: Limits the report to timing checks on specified pins or ports

options.name: -check_type
options.description: Limits the report to the type of check(s) in the check_type_list. Valid types are: setup, hold, pulse_width, recovery, removal, etc

options.name: -exclude_untested
options.description: Excludes the unconstrained endpoints due to a specific reason. Valid reasons are: false_path, const, user_disable, power_mode_shutoff etc

options.name: -include_dyn_checks
options.description: Reports the non-structural endpoints constrained due to set_data_check, set_max_delay, set_min_delay, etc

options.name: -include_parallel_check_arcs
options.description: Reports all parallel check arcs which have been merged

options.name: -include_when_cond
options.description: Reports the when cond of check arcs

options.name: -max_paths
options.description: Enumerates the specified number of worst paths in the design, regardless of the endpoint (supported with -retime)

options.name: -nworst
options.description: Enumerates the specified number of paths for each endpoint (supported with -retime)

options.name: -retime
options.description: {aocv ssta path_slew_propagation aocv_path_slew_propagation} Reanalyzes the specified set of paths using the specified method

options.name: -sort
options.description: {pin refpin checktype slack reason} Sorts the checks by the specified method under -verbose mode

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Produces the report in Tcl list format instead of a tabular format

options.name: -unsorted
options.description: Reports unsorted slacks with untested end points in end of report

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Limits the detailed information to only the checks with the status specified. Valid status types are: met, violated, and untested

options.name: -view
options.description: Generates a timing check report for the specified analysis view only. By default all active views are reported (string, optional) > <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file
